name: Papas Fritas Con Rajas (Potatoes Fried with Chile Strips)
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds red bliss or other waxy potatoes
recipeInstructions:
This is an excellent accompaniment for roasted and broiled meats,
especially if you want something more substantial than the rajas
alone.
Cook the potatoes but be careful not to overcook; they should be al dente, or they will disintegrate during frying.
Remove the seeds and veins from the chiles and cut them into strips about 1 3/4 inches long and 1/2 inch wide. If the chiles seem too spicy, soak them in salted water for about 30 minutes.
Heat the oil and fry the onions gently until they are soft.
Add the chile strips, potatoes, and salt to the onions in the pan.
Without covering the pan, fry the potatoes until they are nicely browned, stirring occasionally so the chiles and onions do not stick to the bottom of the pan.
